name: SkillGate Agents
short_description: Runtime security for Claude Code agents
long_description: SkillGate Agents helps teams secure Claude Code projects by catching risky instructions, governing hooks and MCP providers, and recording signed audit evidence. It covers instruction files, slash commands, memory, hooks, plugins, and sub-agent flows with practical remediation guidance.
attack_surfaces_covered: MCP tool descriptions (injection scan before model exposure)
Org/user/repo scope-hardening with identity-bound governance artifacts
